debug_info.goal:
K : Type u_1
L : Type u_2
inst✝³ : Field K
inst✝² : Field L
inst✝¹ : Algebra K L
inst✝ : Finite K
⊢ IsCyclotomicExtension {n | ↑n ≠ 0} K L ↔ IsAlgClosure K L

failed_attempts:
refine ⟨by simp [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Ne, ← FiniteField.card K, CharP.cast_card_eq_zero K, zero_pow hk], ?_⟩
    refine (IsAlgClosure.exists_primitive_root _ (Polynomial.separable_X_pow_sub_one _ (by simp [Ne, ← FiniteField.card K, CharP.cast_card_eq_zero K, zero_pow hk]))).isPrimitiveRoot_of_mem_rootSet ?_
    rw [Polynomial.mem_rootSet_iff, Polynomial.isRoot_iff_map]
    · exact Or.resolve_left (Polynomial.isRoot_mul_iff.mp (Polynomial.isRoot_of_dvd h (Polynomial.aeval_minpoly K x))) (by rwa [Polynomial.isRoot_X, map_eq_zero])
    · exact Polynomial.X_pow_sub_one_ne_zero (by simp [Ne, ← FiniteField.card K, CharP.cast_card_eq_zero K, zero_pow hk])

apply IsAlgClosure.of_isAlgebraic_of_isSplittingField_irreducibles
    intro f hf
    let n := Fintype.card K ^ f.natDegree - 1
    have hn : n ∈ S := by
      rw [mem_setOf_eq, Ne, CharP.cast_eq_zero_iff K (ringChar K)]
      refine (Nat.Coprime.dvd_of_dvd_left (CharP.ringChar_dvd_card K) ?_).not_dvd
      exact Nat.coprime_self_pow_sub_one _ (Finite.card_pos.ne')
    have : Splits (algebraMap K L) (X ^ n - 1) := IsCyclotomicExtension.splits_X_pow_sub_one L n
    have : Splits (algebraMap K L) (X * (X ^ n - 1)) := Splits.mul (splits_X_sub_def _ _) this
    rw [mul_sub, mul_one, ← pow_succ, Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.one_le_pow _ _ Finite.card_pos)] at this
    exact Splits.of_divides _ this (hf.dvd_X_pow_card_pow_sub_X)
  · have : Algebra.IsAlgebraic K L := IsAlgClosure.isAlgebraic K L
    apply IsCyclotomicExtension.iff_adjoin_roots.2
    intro x
    by_cases h0 : x = 0; · subst x; exact ⟨1, by simp, by simp⟩
    let F := IntermediateField.adjoin K {x}
    have : FiniteDimensional K F := IntermediateField.finiteDimensional_adjoin_simple_iff.2 (IsAlgClosure.isAlgebraic K L x)
    have : Finite F := Module.Finite.finite K F
    use Fintype.card F - 1
    constructor
    · rw [mem_setOf_eq, Ne, CharP.cast_eq_zero_iff K (ringChar K)]
      have : ringChar K = ringChar F := CharP.ringChar_of_algebra K F
      rw [this]
      refine (Nat.Coprime.dvd_of_dvd_left (CharP.ringChar_dvd_card F) ?_).not_dvd
      exact Nat.coprime_self_pow_sub_one _ (Finite.card_pos.ne')
    · have := FiniteField.pow_card_sub_one_eq_one ⟨x, IntermediateField.mem_adjoin_simple_self K x⟩ (by simpa using h0)
      exact Subtype.ext_iff.1 this

apply IsAlgClosure.of_isAlgClosed
    refine IsAlgClosed.of_exists_root _ fun f hf ↦ ?_
    let E := f.SplittingField
    have : Finite E := Module.Finite.of_surjective (Algebra.ofId K E)
      (Polynomial.IsSplittingField.adjoin_rootSet _ f).symm
    let m := Fintype.card E - 1
    have hm : m ∈ S := by
      rw [mem_setOf_eq, Ne, CharP.cast_eq_zero_iff K (ringChar K), ← Nat.coprime_iff_not_dvd]
      exact Nat.coprime_sub_one_right (CharP.cast_card_eq_zero K)
    have : IsSplittingField K E (Polynomial.X ^ m - 1) :=
      FiniteField.isSplittingField_X_pow_card_sub_one _ _
    obtain ⟨g⟩ := IsSplittingField.lift E (Polynomial.X ^ m - 1) (by
      simpa using IsCyclotomicExtension.splits_X_pow_sub_one K L hm)
    exact ⟨g (f.rootOfSplits (Polynomial.IsSplittingField.splits E f)),
      by rw [← Polynomial.aeval_def, ← Polynomial.aeval_map_algebraMap,
        Polynomial.aeval_rootOfSplits, map_zero]⟩
  · refine IsCyclotomicExtension.of_splits_and_gen S K L (fun n hn ↦
      IsAlgClosed.splits_codomain (Polynomial.X ^ n - 1)) (fun x ↦ ?_)
    let E := Algebra.adjoin K {x}
    have : Finite E := Finite.of_fintype E
    let m := Fintype.card E - 1
    have hm : m ∈ S := by
      rw [mem_setOf_eq, Ne, CharP.cast_eq_zero_iff K (ringChar K), ← Nat.coprime_iff_not_dvd]
      exact Nat.coprime_sub_one_right (CharP.cast_card_eq_zero K)
    have : IsSplittingField K E (Polynomial.X ^ m - 1) :=
      FiniteField.isSplittingField_X_pow_card_sub_one _ _
    rw [← IsSplittingField.adjoin_roots K E (Polynomial.X ^ m - 1)]
    apply Algebra.adjoin_mono
    rintro y ⟨y, hy, rfl⟩
    use m, hm
    exact (Polynomial.isRoot_X_pow_sub_one _).mp hy

exact Algebra.subset_adjoin ⟨n, hn, x, by
        rw [mem_rootSet_of_ne (X_pow_sub_one_ne_zero hn _)]
        exact ⟨FiniteField.pow_card_sub_one_eq_one x hx, rfl⟩⟩
  · haveI := h.algebra_isAlgebraic
    apply IsAlgClosure.of_algebraic_of_splits
    intro f hf
    by_cases hfX : f = X; · rw [hfX]; exact splits_X _
    let n := Fintype.card K ^ f.natDegree - 1
    have hn : (n : K) ≠ 0 := (FiniteField.isUnit_card_pow_sub_one K f.natDegree
      (Polynomial.natDegree_pos_of_irreducible hf).ne').ne_zero
    exact Splits.of_dvd (Polynomial.Irreducible.dvd_X_pow_sub_one hf hfX)
      (h.splits_X_pow_sub_one n hn)

obtain ⟨ζ, hζ⟩ := IsCyclic.exists_generator (Units E)
    refine ⟨orderOf ζ, ?_, ζ, IsPrimitiveRoot.orderOf ζ, ?_⟩
    · rw [hζ.orderOf_eq_card_sub_one, Nat.cast_sub (Fintype.card_pos_iff.mpr inferInstance),
        ← map_eq_zero (algebraMap K E), map_natCast, CharP.cast_card_eq_zero, map_zero, zero_sub]
      exact neg_ne_zero.mpr one_ne_zero
    · rw [hζ.isUnit_unit.eq_adjoin_root]
      exact IntermediateField.mem_adjoin_simple_self x

rw [Nat.cast_sub (Nat.one_le_pow _ _ Fintype.one_lt_card.le), Nat.cast_one, Nat.cast_pow,
        CharP.cast_card_eq_zero K, zero_pow (Polynomial.natDegree_pos_of_irreducible f hf).ne', zero_sub]
      exact neg_ne_zero.2 one_ne_zero
    have : Polynomial.Splits (algebraMap K L) (Polynomial.X ^ n - 1) :=
      IsCyclotomicExtension.splits_X_pow_sub_one K L hn
    obtain ⟨y, hy⟩ := (Polynomial.splits_iff_card_roots.1 this).1
    refine ⟨y, ?_⟩
    rw [← Polynomial.aeval_def, ← Polynomial.dvd_iff_isRoot]
    refine Polynomial.dvd_trans (Polynomial.dvd_X_pow_sub_X f hf) ?_
    rw [Polynomial.X_pow_eq_mul_sub_one_add_one _ n, sub_add_cancel]
    exact Polynomial.dvd_mul_of_dvd_right (Polynomial.dvd_trans (Polynomial.dvd_sub_self_left
      (Polynomial.pow_dvd_pow_of_dvd (Polynomial.dvd_X_sub_C y) _)) (Polynomial.dvd_iff_isRoot.2 hy)) _
  · apply IsCyclotomicExtension.mk
    · intro n hn
      exact IsAlgClosed.splits_codomain (Polynomial.X ^ n - 1)
    · rw [eq_top_iff]; intro x _
      by_cases hx : x = 0; · simp [hx]
      have : Finite (IntermediateField.adjoin K {x}) :=
        IntermediateField.finite_adjoin_simple K x (IsAlgClosure.isAlgebraic K L x)
      let q := Fintype.card (IntermediateField.adjoin K {x})
      have hq : (q - 1 : K) ≠ 0 := by
        rw [Nat.cast_sub Fintype.one_lt_card.le, Nat.cast_one, CharP.cast_card_eq_zero K, zero_sub]
        exact neg_ne_zero.2 one_ne_zero
      refine Algebra.subset_adjoin ⟨q - 1, hq, ?_⟩
      let u := Units.mk0 ⟨x, IntermediateField.subset_adjoin K {x} (Set.mem_singleton x)⟩
        (Subtype.ne_of_val_ne hx)
      simpa using u.pow_card_sub_one_eq_one

exact subset_adjoin ⟨Fintype.card K ^ n - 1, FiniteField.ne_zero_of_pow_card_sub_one K n,
      (mem_rootSet_of_ne (X_pow_sub_one_ne_zero _ _)).2 (by simpa [hx] using hn)⟩

rw [IsCyclotomicExtension.iff_isSplittingField_X_pow_sub_one]
  refine ⟨fun h ↦ IsAlgClosure.of_algebraic_of_splits h.algebraic fun f hf ↦ ?_,
    fun h ↦ ⟨IsAlgClosure.algebraic K L, fun _ ⟨n, _, hn⟩ ↦ hn ▸ IsAlgClosure.splits_codomain _⟩⟩
  rcases eq_or_ne f X with rfl | hne; · exact splits_X
  obtain ⟨m, hm⟩ := Irreducible.dvd_X_pow_card_pow_sub_one f hf hne
  refine IsSplittingField.splits_of_dvd _ (h.splits ⟨_, ?_, rfl⟩) hm
  rw [mem_setOf_eq, Nat.cast_sub_one, Nat.cast_pow, CharP.cast_card_eq_zero K,
    zero_pow (Nat.degree_pos_of_irreducible hf).ne', zero_sub]
  exact neg_ne_zero.2 one_ne_zero

let n := Nat.card E - 1
    have hn : (n : K) ≠ 0 := by
      rw [Nat.cast_sub (Finite.card_pos.le), CharP.cast_card_eq_zero K E, zero_sub]
      exact neg_ne_zero.mp one_ne_zero
    refine (splits_of_splits_of_dvd _ (FiniteField.dvd_X_pow_card_sub_X f) ?_).exists_root
    rw [← Nat.sub_add_cancel (Finite.card_pos (α := E)), pow_add, pow_one, mul_sub, mul_one]
    exact ((IsCyclotomicExtension.iff_isSplittingField.mp h).1 n hn).mul_X
  · refine IsCyclotomicExtension.iff_isSplittingField.mpr ⟨fun n _ ↦ IsAlgClosed.splits_codomain _,
      eq_top_iff.mpr fun x _ ↦ ?_⟩
    obtain ⟨E, hE, rfl⟩ := (IsAlgClosure.isAlgebraic K L).adjoin_finite_subalgebra x
    have : Finite E := Module.Finite.of_restrictScalars_finite K E hE
    let n := Nat.card E - 1
    have hn : (n : K) ≠ 0 := by
      rw [Nat.cast_sub (Finite.card_pos.le), CharP.cast_card_eq_zero K E, zero_sub]
      exact neg_ne_zero.mp one_ne_zero
    obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := IsCyclic.exists_generator (α := Eˣ)
    refine Algebra.adjoin_mono ?_ (Algebra.adjoin_singleton_eq_top_of_gen_eq_top _ g hg).ge (Set.mem_univ _)
    simp only [Set.singleton_subset_iff, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    exact ⟨n, hn, by rw [← Units.val_pow_eq_pow_val, ← Fintype.card_units, ← hg.orderOf_eq_card,
      pow_orderOf_eq_one, Units.val_one]⟩

· by_cases hx : x = 0; · rw [hx]; exact zero_mem _
        exact subset_adjoin (by simp [FiniteField.pow_card_sub_one_eq_one x hx])
    obtain ⟨φ⟩ := Polynomial.IsSplittingField.lift E (X ^ n - 1)
      (IsCyclotomicExtension.splits_X_pow_sub_one L n hn)
    exact Splits.of_algHom (SplittingField.splits f) φ
  · apply IsCyclotomicExtension.of_splits_and_eq_adjoin_roots
    · exact fun n hn ↦ IsAlgClosure.splits_codomain _ (Polynomial.X_pow_sub_C_ne_zero hn 1)
    · refine eq_top_iff.mpr fun x _ ↦ ?_
      by_cases hx : x = 0; · rw [hx]; exact zero_mem _
      have : Finite (K⟮x⟯) := Module.Finite.of_adjoin_isAlgebraic (Set.finite_singleton x)
        (fun y hy => by rw [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hy; rw [hy]; exact IsAlgClosure.isAlgebraic K x)
      have : Fintype (K⟮x⟯) := Fintype.ofFinite _
      let n := Fintype.card (K⟮x⟯) - 1
      have hn : n ∈ S := by
        rw [mem_setOf_eq, Ne, ← CharP.cast_eq_zero_iff K (ringChar K) n,
          CharP.cast_card_sub_one_eq_zero_iff (K⟮x⟯) (ringChar K)]
        exact (Nat.one_lt_pow (Finite.one_lt_card_iff_nontrivial.mpr (by nontriviality K⟮x⟯))
          (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (CharP.char_ne_zero_of_finite K (ringChar K)))).ne'
      exact subset_adjoin ⟨n, hn, FiniteField.pow_card_sub_one_eq_one (AdjoinSimple.gen K x)
        (mt AdjoinSimple.gen_eq_zero.mp hx)⟩

apply IsAlgClosure.of_algebraic_of_isSplittingField_of_irreducible _
    intro f hf
    obtain ⟨k, hk, h⟩ := Polynomial.Irreducible.dvd_X_pow_sub_X f hf
    refine Polynomial.Splits.of_dvd (algebraMap K L) h ?_
    rw [Polynomial.X_pow_sub_X_eq_X_mul_X_pow_sub_one, Polynomial.splits_mul, Polynomial.splits_X]
    refine ⟨by simp, IsCyclotomicExtension.splits_X_pow_sub_one L S ?_⟩
    rw [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Ne, CharP.cast_eq_zero_iff K (ringChar K)]
    exact Nat.coprime_self_pow_sub_one _ hk (CharP.char_ne_one K (ringChar K))
  · rw [IsCyclotomicExtension.iff_isSplittingField]
    refine ⟨fun n _ ↦ IsAlgClosure.splits_codomain _, ?_⟩
    rw [eq_top_iff]; intro x _
    by_cases hx0 : x = 0; · rw [hx0]; exact zero_mem _
    obtain ⟨k, hk, h⟩ := Polynomial.Irreducible.dvd_X_pow_sub_X (minpoly K x)
      (minpoly.irreducible (IsAlgClosure.isAlgebraic K L x))
    apply Algebra.subset_adjoin
    refine ⟨X ^ (Fintype.card K ^ k - 1) - 1, ⟨_, ?_, rfl⟩, ?_⟩
    · rw [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Ne, CharP.cast_eq_zero_iff K (ringChar K)]
      exact Nat.coprime_self_pow_sub_one _ hk (CharP.char_ne_one K (ringChar K))
    · rw [Polynomial.mem_roots, Polynomial.isRoot_map, Polynomial.isRoot_def, Polynomial.eval_sub,
          Polynomial.eval_one, sub_eq_zero, Polynomial.eval_pow, Polynomial.eval_X]
      · have : aeval x (X ^ (Fintype.card K ^ k) - X : K[X]) = 0 :=
          (Polynomial.dvd_iff_isRoot.mp (Polynomial.map_dvd (algebraMap K L) h)).map _
        rw [aeval_def, Polynomial.eval_map, Polynomial.X_pow_sub_X_eq_X_mul_X_pow_sub_one,
            Polynomial.eval_mul, Polynomial.eval_X, mul_eq_zero] at this
        exact this.resolve_left hx0
      · exact Polynomial.X_pow_sub_one_ne_zero _ (Nat.sub_pos_of_lt (Nat.one_lt_pow hk (Fintype.one_lt_card K)))

let n := Fintype.card F - 1
    have hn : (n : K) ≠ 0 := by
      rw [Nat.cast_sub Fintype.one_lt_card.le, Nat.cast_one, CharP.cast_card_eq_zero, zero_sub]
      exact neg_ne_zero.mpr one_ne_zero
    refine Algebra.subset_adjoin ⟨n, hn, x, ?_, rfl⟩
    rw [mem_roots (X_pow_sub_one_ne_zero hn), IsRoot, eval_sub, eval_pow, eval_C,
      ← FiniteField.pow_card_sub_one_eq_one x hx, sub_self]

rw [Ne, ← CharP.cast_eq_zero_iff K (ringChar K), CharP.cast_card_eq_zero K]
      exact Nat.not_dvd_of_pos_of_lt (Nat.sub_pos_of_lt (Nat.one_lt_pow n q (Fintype.card_pos_iff.2 ‹_›)
        (natDegree_pos_iff_degree_pos.2 (degree_pos_of_irreducible hf)))) (Nat.sub_lt (Nat.pow_pos (Fintype.card_pos_iff.2 ‹_›) _) one_pos)
    refine ⟨_, (exists_root_of_splits _ (splits_of_splits_of_dvd _
      (splits_mul _ (splits_X _) (IsCyclotomicExtension.splits_X_pow_sub_one L hn))
      (Polynomial.dvd_X_pow_card_pow_sub_X f hf.ne_zero rfl))
      (degree_pos_of_irreducible hf)).choose_spec⟩
  · have : Algebra.IsAlgebraic K L := IsAlgClosure.isAlgebraic K L
    rw [IsCyclotomicExtension.iff_isSplittingField]
    refine ⟨fun n hn ↦ IsAlgClosed.splits_codomain _, eq_top_iff.2 fun x ↦ ?_⟩
    by_cases hx : x = 0; · subst x; exact zero_mem _
    let Kx := IntermediateField.adjoin K {x}
    have : Fintype Kx := IntermediateField.fintypeOfIsAlgebraic (this x)
    let n := Fintype.card Kx - 1
    have hn : n ∈ S := by
      rw [mem_setOf, Ne, ← CharP.cast_eq_zero_iff K (ringChar K), CharP.cast_card_eq_zero K]
      exact Nat.not_dvd_of_pos_of_lt (Nat.sub_pos_of_lt (Fintype.one_lt_card_iff_nontrivial.2 inferInstance))
        (Nat.sub_lt (Fintype.card_pos_iff.2 ‹_›) one_pos)
    have hroot : x ^ n = 1 := by
      rw [← Subtype.coe_inj, Subgroup.coe_pow, Subgroup.coe_one,
        ← FiniteField.pow_card_sub_one_eq_one (⟨x, IntermediateField.mem_adjoin_simple_self _ _⟩ : Kx)
        (mt Subtype.coe_eq_zero.1 hx)]
    exact Algebra.subset_adjoin ⟨X ^ n - 1, ⟨n, hn, rfl⟩, by rw [mem_rootSet_of_ne (X_pow_sub_C_ne_zero (by simp [hn]) _), IsRoot.def, eval_sub, eval_pow, eval_X, eval_one, sub_eq_zero, hroot]⟩

refine IsAlgClosure.of_finite_extension K _ fun E _ _ _ ↦ ?_
    obtain ⟨n, hn, rfl⟩ := FiniteField.exists_extension_eq_adjoin_root_of_unity K E
    exact IsCyclotomicExtension.splits_X_pow_sub_one L hn
  · refine ⟨fun n _ ↦ IsAlgClosed.splits_codomain _, eq_top_iff.2 fun x _ ↦ ?_⟩
    obtain ⟨E, hE, hx⟩ := IsAlgClosure.exists_finite_subextension K x
    have : Finite E := Module.Finite.of_restrictScalars_finite K E hE
    obtain ⟨n, hn, rfl⟩ := FiniteField.exists_extension_eq_adjoin_root_of_unity K E
    exact Algebra.adjoin_mono (fun y hy ↦ by
      obtain ⟨m, hm, hprim⟩ := IsRootOfUnity.exists_primitive_root (IsRootOfUnity.mk_of_pow_eq hy (Nat.cast_ne_zero.mp hn))
      exact ⟨m, fun h ↦ hn (dvd_trans (RingChar.dvd h) hm), hprim⟩) hx

rw [Ne, CharP.cast_eq_zero_iff K (ringChar K)]
      have : Nat.Coprime (Fintype.card K ^ d) (Fintype.card K ^ d - 1) :=
        Nat.coprime_sub_self_right.mpr (Nat.coprime_one_left _)
      exact (Nat.Coprime.coprime_dvd_left (dvd_pow (CharP.cast_card_eq_zero K)
        hf.natDegree_pos.ne.bot_lt) this).symm
    obtain ⟨\zeta, h\zeta⟩ := IsCyclotomicExtension.exists_roots (L := L) _ hd
    exact Polynomial.exists_root_of_splits _ (Polynomial.splits_of_splits_of_dvd _
      (Polynomial.splits_mul _ _ h\zeta.splits_X_pow_sub_one)
      (FiniteField.irreducible_dvd_X_pow_sub_X f hf)) (by simpa using hf.natDegree_pos)
  · constructor
    · intro n hn
      have hsep : (Polynomial.X ^ n - 1 : L[X]).Separable := Polynomial.separable_X_pow_sub_C _
        (IsUnit.mk0 _ (by exact_mod_cast hn)) one_ne_zero
      obtain ⟨\zeta, h\zeta⟩ := IsCyclic.exists_generator (rootsOfUnity n L)
      refine ⟨\zeta, IsPrimitiveRoot.iff_def.mpr ⟨\zeta.2, fun m hm ↦ ?_⟩⟩
      rw [← orderOf_eq_card_of_forall_mem_zpowers h\zeta]
      convert hm
      rw [Fintype.card_coe, Multiset.toFinset_card_of_nodup (Polynomial.nodup_roots hsep.map),
        Polynomial.card_roots (IsAlgClosed.splits_codomain _), Polynomial.natDegree_X_pow_sub_C]
    · rw [Algebra.eq_top_iff]
      intro x
      let E := Algebra.adjoin K {x}
      haveI : Finite E := Module.Finite.of_surjective (Algebra.adjoin.surjective K {x})
      obtain ⟨\zeta, h\zeta⟩ := FiniteField.exists_primitive_root E
      have horder : Fintype.card E - 1 ∈ S := by
        rw [mem_setOf_eq, Ne, CharP.cast_eq_zero_iff K (ringChar K)]
        have : Nat.Coprime (Fintype.card E) (Fintype.card E - 1) :=
          Nat.coprime_sub_self_right.mpr (Nat.coprime_one_left _)
        exact (Nat.Coprime.coprime_dvd_left (dvd_trans (CharP.cast_card_eq_zero K)
          (FiniteField.card_dvd_card_of_tower K E)) this).symm
      rw [← Algebra.adjoin_simple_eq_gen_iff.mpr h\zeta.isUnit_unit]
      apply Algebra.adjoin_mono
      simp only [Set.singleton_subset_iff, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
      use Fintype.card E - 1, horder
      exact h\zeta.pow_eq_one
simpa using congr_arg (algebraMap E L) (FiniteField.pow_card_sub_one_eq_one ⟨x, this⟩ (mt (Subtype.ext_iff.1) hx))

refine IsAlgClosure.of_isAlgebraic_of_isSplitting this fun f _ ↦ ?_
    rcases IsSplittingField.exists_finite_subfield K f this with ⟨E, _, _, hsp⟩
    have : Finite E := Finite.of_fintype E
    let n := Fintype.card E - 1
    have hn : n ∈ S := by
      rw [mem_setOf_eq, Ne, Nat.cast_pred (Fintype.card_pos_iff.mpr inferInstance),
        CharP.cast_card_eq_zero K, sub_eq_zero, neg_eq_zero, one_ne_zero]
    have : E ≤ Algebra.adjoin K {x : L | ∃ n ∈ S, x ^ n = 1} := by
      rw [Algebra.adjoin_le_iff]; intro x hx
      by_cases h0 : x = 0; · rw [h0]; exact zero_mem _
      exact subset_adjoin ⟨n, hn, by rw [← map_pow, FiniteField.pow_card_sub_one_eq_one ⟨x, hx⟩ h0, map_one]⟩
    rw [← IsCyclotomicExtension.adjoin_roots S (K := K) (L := L)] at this
    exact Splits.map (Algebra.inclusion this) hsp
  · apply IsCyclotomicExtension.iff_isSplittingField.mpr ⟨fun n _ ↦ IsAlgClosed.splits_codomain _, ?_⟩
    rw [eq_top_iff]; intro x _
    have : Algebra.IsAlgebraic K L := h.1
    let E := Algebra.adjoin K {x}
    have : Finite E := Finite.of_fintype E
    let n := Fintype.card E - 1
    have hn : n ∈ S := by
      rw [mem_setOf_eq, Ne, Nat.cast_pred (Fintype.card_pos_iff.mpr inferInstance),
        CharP.cast_card_eq_zero K, sub_eq_zero, neg_eq_zero, one_ne_zero]
    by_cases h0 : x = 0; · rw [h0]; exact zero_mem _
    have hx : x ∈ E := Algebra.subset_adjoin (Set.mem_singleton x)
    have : (⟨x, hx⟩ : E) ^ n = 1 := FiniteField.pow_card_sub_one_eq_one ⟨x, hx⟩ (by simpa using h0)
    refine subset_adjoin ⟨n, hn, ?_⟩
    simpa using congr_arg (algebraMap E L) this

have h1 : (Fintype.card K ^ f.natDegree - 1 : K) ≠ 0 :=
      (FiniteField.isUnit_card_pow_sub_one K f.natDegree).ne_zero
    refine Polynomial.exists_root_of_splits _ (Polynomial.Splits.of_mul _ (Polynomial.Splits.of_mul _ 
      (Polynomial.splits_X _) ?_) hn) (Polynomial.degree_le_of_dvd hn (by simp))
    exact IsCyclotomicExtension.splits_X_pow_sub_one K L (Set.mem_setOf.2 h1)
  · rw [isCyclotomicExtension_iff_isSplittingField_set]
    refine IsSplittingField.mk _ (fun _ ⟨n, _, rfl⟩ ↦ IsAlgClosed.splits_codomain _) ?_
    rw [eq_top_iff]; intro x _; have := IsAlgClosure.isIntegral K x
    obtain ⟨n, hn, hx⟩ := FiniteField.exists_pow_card_eq_self_of_isIntegral K x this
    by_cases hx0 : x = 0; · simp [hx0, Subalgebra.zero_mem]
    have h : x ^ (Fintype.card K ^ n - 1) = 1 := by
      rw [← mul_left_inj' hx0, ← pow_succ', Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.one_le_pow _ _ (Fintype.card_pos_iff.2 ‹_›)), hx, mul_one]
    refine Algebra.adjoin_mono (s := {Polynomial.X ^ (Fintype.card K ^ n - 1) - 1}) ?_ 
      (Polynomial.mem_adjoin_of_eq_zero (Polynomial.X ^ (Fintype.card K ^ n - 1) - 1) 
      (by simp [Polynomial.eval_sub, Polynomial.eval_pow, h]))
    simp only [Set.image_subset_iff, Set.singleton_subset_iff, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    exact ⟨_, (FiniteField.isUnit_card_pow_sub_one K n).ne_zero, rfl⟩
L⟩

exact Splits.of_dvd ((isCyclotomicExtension_iff_isSplittingField_X_pow_sub_one _ _ _).mp h).splits ⟨n, hn, rfl⟩ (FiniteField.irreducible_dvd_X_pow_sub_one f hf)
  · rw [isCyclotomicExtension_iff_isSplittingField_X_pow_sub_one]; refine ⟨h.splits_set _, (eq_top_iff _).mpr fun x _ ↦ ?_⟩
    by_cases hx : x = 0; · rw [hx]; exact zero_mem _
    have := Module.Finite.iff_fg.mpr (IsAlgClosure.algebraic K L x).fg_adjoin
    let n := Fintype.card (Algebra.adjoin K {x}) - 1
    have hn : (n : K) ≠ 0 := by rw [Nat.cast_sub_one, CharP.cast_card_eq_zero, zero_sub]; exact neg_ne_zero.mpr one_ne_zero
    refine subset_adjoin_roots _ ⟨n, hn, rfl⟩ (by rw [mem_rootSet_of_ne (X_pow_sub_one_ne_zero hn.ne_zero_of_map) (h.splits _), aeval_X_pow_sub_one]; exact FiniteField.pow_card_sub_one_eq_one ⟨x, Algebra.subset_adjoin (Set.mem_singleton x)⟩ (mt Subtype.ext_iff.mp hx))

let n := Fintype.card E - 1
    have hn : (n : K) ≠ 0 := by
      rw [Nat.cast_pred (Fintype.card_pos_iff.mpr ‹_›), CharP.cast_card_eq_zero K, zero_sub]
      exact neg_ne_zero.mpr one_ne_zero
    obtain ⟨ζ, hζ⟩ := IsCyclotomicExtension.exists_prim_root (S := {n | (n : K) ≠ 0}) (K := K) (L := L) n hn
    obtain ⟨φ⟩ := Polynomial.IsSplittingField.exists_algebra_of_splits K E (X ^ n - 1)
      hζ.splits_X_pow_sub_one
      (by rw [Polynomial.splits_id_iff_splits, Polynomial.map_sub, Polynomial.map_pow, Polynomial.map_one, Polynomial.map_X]; exact FiniteField.splits_X_pow_card_sub_one_sub_one E)
    exact ⟨_, φ.toRingHom.comp (Polynomial.IsSplittingField.adjoin_root E hf)⟩
  · refine ⟨fun n hn ↦ IsAlgClosed.exists_isPrimitiveRoot n hn, fun x ↦ ?_⟩
    obtain ⟨E, hE, hxE⟩ := IntermediateField.exists_finite_type_of_isAlgebraic (IsAlgClosure.isAlgebraic K L x)
    have : Finite E := FiniteDimensional.finite_of_finite K E
    let n := Fintype.card E - 1
    have hn : (n : K) ≠ 0 := by
      rw [Nat.cast_pred (Fintype.card_pos_iff.mpr ‹_›), CharP.cast_card_eq_zero K, zero_sub]
      exact neg_ne_zero.mpr one_ne_zero
    obtain ⟨ζ, hζ⟩ := FiniteField.exists_primitive_element E
    have h_prim : IsPrimitiveRoot (algebraMap E L ζ) n := by
      rw [IsPrimitiveRoot.map_iff_of_injective (algebraMap E L).injective]
      exact FiniteField.isPrimitiveRoot_card_sub_one ζ
    have : algebraMap E L ζ ∈ Algebra.adjoin K {r | ∃ n, (n : K) ≠ 0 ∧ IsPrimitiveRoot r n} :=
      Algebra.subset_adjoin ⟨n, hn, h_prim⟩
    rw [← hE, ← Subalgebra.mem_map (Algebra.ofId E L), hζ, Algebra.adjoin_map_args] at hxE
    refine Subalgebra.adjoin_le (Set.singleton_subset_iff.mpr this) hxE

refine ⟨fun h ↦ ?_, fun h ↦ ?_⟩
  · have : IsSplittingField K L {X ^ n - 1 | n ∈ S} := IsCyclotomicExtension.iff_isSplittingField.mp h
    apply IsAlgClosure.of_splits_of_all_roots_mem
    · exact IsSplittingField.algebraic (S := {X ^ n - 1 | n ∈ S})
    · intro f hf
      let q := Fintype.card K
      have hq : (q : K) = 0 := CharP.cast_card_eq_zero K
      let k := f.natDegree
      have h_div : f ∣ X ^ (q ^ k) - X := Polynomial.dvd_X_pow_card_pow_sub_X k f (by simp)
      apply Splits.of_dvd _ h_div (splits_mul _ (splits_X _) _)
      apply IsSplittingField.splits (S := {X ^ n - 1 | n ∈ S})
      use q ^ k - 1
      refine ⟨?_, rfl⟩
      rw [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Ne, Nat.cast_sub (one_le_pow_of_one_le (Fintype.card_pos) _),
          Nat.cast_one, Nat.cast_pow, hq, zero_pow (by simp [k, Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (Polynomial.natDegree_ne_zero_of_degree_ne_bot (Polynomial.degree_eq_natDegree hf.ne_zero ▸ hf.ne_bot))]), zero_sub]
      exact neg_ne_zero.mpr one_ne_zero
  · rw [IsCyclotomicExtension.iff_isSplittingField]
    refine IsSplittingField.mk_of_splits_of_generate_roots 
      (fun p ⟨n, _, hp⟩ ↦ hp ▸ IsAlgClosure.splits_codomain p) ?_
    rw [eq_top_iff]
    intro x
    by_cases hx : x = 0; · simp [hx]
    let q := Fintype.card K
    let E := Algebra.adjoin K {x}
    have : Finite E := Finite.of_isAlgebraic_of_finite (IsAlgClosure.isAlgebraic K x)
    have : Fintype E := Fintype.ofFinite E
    let k := FiniteDimensional.finrank K E
    have hk : 0 < k := FiniteDimensional.finrank_pos
    have hpow : x ^ (q ^ k) = x := by
      have hcard : Fintype.card E = q ^ k := Fintype.card_eq_pow_finrank
      have := FiniteField.pow_card_eq (⟨x, Algebra.subset_adjoin (Set.mem_singleton x)⟩ : E)
      simp only [hcard] at this
      exact this
    refine Algebra.subset_adjoin ⟨q ^ k - 1, ?_, ?_⟩
    · rw [Set.mem_setOf_eq, Ne, Nat.cast_sub (one_le_pow_of_one_le (Fintype.card_pos) _), 
          Nat.cast_one, Nat.cast_pow, CharP.cast_card_eq_zero K, zero_pow (by simp [hk]), zero_sub]
      exact neg_ne_zero.mpr one_ne_zero
    · rw [Polynomial.mem_roots (by simp [X_pow_sub_one_ne_zero]), Polynomial.eval_sub, 
          Polynomial.eval_pow, Polynomial.eval_X, Polynomial.eval_one, sub_eq_zero]
      apply (mul_eq_zero.mp (a := x) _).resolve_left hx
      rw [mul_sub, mul_one, ← pow_succ', Nat.sub_add_cancel (one_le_pow_of_one_le (Fintype.card_pos) _), hpow, sub_self]
nce

by_cases hx0 : x = 0; · exact ⟨x, hx, hx0.symm ▸ map_zero _⟩
    have hn : Fintype.card E - 1 ∈ S := by
      rw [mem_setOf_eq, Ne, ← ringChar.spec K, RingChar.eq (R := E) (ringChar K),
        ← CharP.cast_eq_zero_iff E (ringChar E), Nat.cast_sub_one (Fintype.card_pos_iff.mpr ⟨0⟩),
        sub_eq_zero, Nat.cast_one]
      exact (FiniteField.card_coprime_char E).symm.ne_one
    exact ⟨x, hx, (pow_card_sub_one_eq_one x hx0).isRoot_of_unity
      (IsCyclotomicExtension.splits_cyclotomic S K L hn)⟩
  · refine IsCyclotomicExtension.of_splitting_field S K L ⟨fun n _ ↦ IsAlgClosed.splits_codomain _, fun x ↦ ?_⟩
    obtain ⟨E, hE, hxE⟩ := IsAlgClosure.isAlgebraic.exists_finite_subfield x
    have : Finite E := ‹_›.finite
    by_cases hx0 : x = 0; · rw [hx0]; exact zero_mem _
    have hn : Fintype.card E - 1 ∈ S := by
      rw [mem_setOf_eq, Ne, ← ringChar.spec K, RingChar.eq (R := E) (ringChar K),
        ← CharP.cast_eq_zero_iff E (ringChar E), Nat.cast_sub_one (Fintype.card_pos_iff.mpr ⟨0⟩),
        sub_eq_zero, Nat.cast_one]
      exact (FiniteField.card_coprime_char E).symm.ne_one
    refine Subalgebra.mem_of_le (adjoin_le_adjoin_of_subset ?_) hxE
    intro y hy
    by_cases hy0 : y = 0; · rw [hy0]; exact zero_mem _
    obtain ⟨d, hd, hy⟩ := (isRoot_prod_cyclotomic_iff (by simp [hn])).1 (pow_card_sub_one_eq_one y hy0)
    exact Set.mem_iUnion.2 ⟨d, Set.mem_iUnion.2 ⟨mem_setOf.2 (fun h ↦ hn (h ▸ hd.dvd)), hy⟩⟩

let M := f.SplittingField K
    haveI : Fintype M := Fintype.ofFinite M
    let m := Fintype.card M - 1
    have hm : m ∈ {n | (n : K) ≠ 0} := by
      rw [mem_setOf, ne_eq, ← ringChar.dvd]
      exact Nat.coprime_self_sub_one.coprime_dvd_right (ringChar.dvd_card_of_finite K M)
    obtain ⟨ζ, hζ⟩ := IsCyclotomicExtension.exists_prim_root K L m hm
    apply Polynomial.splits_of_splits_of_dvd _ (Polynomial.dvd_X_pow_sub_X_simps f M)
    rw [Polynomial.splits_mul, Polynomial.splits_X, BooleanAlgebra.and_true, ← (Polynomial.X_pow_sub_C_eq_prod_roots_of_unity_of_isPrimitiveRoot hζ (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by
      rw [← Fintype.card_ne_one_iff_nontrivial] at hm; exact hm.ne'))).2]
    exact Polynomial.splits_prod _ (fun _ _ => Polynomial.splits_X_sub_C _)
  · refine ⟨fun n hn ↦ ?_, fun x ↦ ?_⟩
    · rw [mem_setOf, ne_eq] at hn
      have : (n : K) ≠ 0 := hn
      have hroots := IsAlgClosure.roots_of_X_pow_sub_one K L n hn
      obtain ⟨r, hr⟩ := IsCyclic.exists_generator (rootsOfUnity n L)
      exact ⟨r, IsPrimitiveRoot.iff_is_generator_of_card_eq_one_le (Nat.one_le_iff_ne_zero.mpr (n_pos_of_ne_zero_nat_cast hn).ne') (by rw [hroots]; rfl) |>.mpr hr⟩
    · let M := Algebra.adjoin K {x}
      haveI : Fintype M := Fintype.ofFinite M
      let m := Fintype.card M - 1
      have hm : m ∈ {n | (n : K) ≠ 0} := by
        rw [mem_setOf, ne_eq, ← ringChar.dvd]
        exact Nat.coprime_self_sub_one.coprime_dvd_right (ringChar.dvd_card_of_finite K M)
      rw [FiniteField.adjoin_unitGen M]
      apply Algebra.adjoin_mono
      use m, hm, FiniteField.unitGen M
      exact FiniteField.unitGen_pow_card_sub_one M

let m := Fintype.card K ^ f.natDegree - 1
    have hm : (m : K) ≠ 0 := by
      rw [ne_eq, ← CharP.cast_eq_zero_iff K (ringChar K), Nat.cast_pred (pow_pos Fintype.card_pos _),
        Nat.cast_pow, CharP.cast_card_eq_zero, zero_pow (f.natDegree_pos hf).ne', zero_sub, neg_eq_zero]
      exact one_ne_zero
    refine Splits.of_dvd _ (Splits.mul _ (Splits.X _) (IsCyclotomicExtension.splits_X_pow_sub_one K L hm)) ?_
    rw [← mul_sub, ← pow_one (X : K[X]), ← pow_add, Nat.sub_add_cancel (pow_pos Fintype.card_pos _)]
    exact FiniteField.irreducible_dvd_X_pow_card_pow_sub_X hf
  · rw [IsCyclotomicExtension.iff_isSplittingField, isSplittingField_iff]
    refine ⟨fun n _ ↦ IsAlgClosure.splits_codomain _, eq_top_iff.mpr fun x _ ↦ ?_⟩
    let E := IntermediateField.adjoin K {x}
    have : Finite E := FiniteDimensional.finite_of_finite K E
    obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ := IsCyclic.exists_generator (α := Eˣ)
    have hg_mem : (g : L) ∈ IntermediateField.adjoin K {a : L | ∃ n : {n | (n : K) ≠ 0}, a ∈ (X ^ n - 1 : K[X]).rootSet L} := by
      refine IntermediateField.subset_adjoin K _ ⟨Fintype.card E - 1, ?_, ?_⟩
      · rw [Set.mem_setOf_eq, ne_eq, ← CharP.cast_eq_zero_iff K (ringChar K), Nat.cast_pred Fintype.card_pos,
          CharP.cast_card_eq_zero, zero_sub, neg_eq_zero]; exact one_ne_zero
      · rw [mem_rootSet_of_ne (X_pow_sub_one_ne_zero (by
            rw [← Nat.cast_ne_zero (R := K), Nat.cast_pred Fintype.card_pos, CharP.cast_card_eq_zero, zero_sub]
            exact neg_ne_zero.mpr one_ne_zero)), aeval_sub, aeval_X_pow, aeval_one, sub_eq_zero,
            ← map_pow (algebraMap E L) g, ← Units.val_pow_eq_pow_val, orderOf_eq_card_iff_pow_eq_one.mp hg,
            Units.val_one, map_one]
    by_cases hx : x = 0; · rw [hx]; exact zero_mem _
    let xE : E := ⟨x, IntermediateField.mem_adjoin_simple_self K x⟩
    obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := hg (Units.mk0 xE (by simpa using hx))
    rw [show x = xE from rfl, ← Units.val_mk0 (by simpa using hx), ← hk, Units.val_pow_eq_pow_val, map_pow]
    exact zpow_mem hg_mem k

refine ⟨fun h ↦ IsAlgClosure.of_splitting_field_of_irreducible K L fun f hf ↦ ?_, fun h ↦ ?_⟩
  · let n := Fintype.card K ^ f.natDegree - 1
    have hn : (n : K) ≠ 0 := by
      rw [Nat.cast_sub (Nat.one_le_pow _ _ (Fintype.card_pos_iff.2 ⟨0⟩)), Nat.cast_one,
        CharP.cast_card_eq_zero, zero_pow (natDegree_ne_zero_of_irreducible hf), zero_sub]
      exact neg_ne_zero.2 one_ne_zero
    exact Splits.of_dvd_map _ (IsCyclotomicExtension.splits_X_pow_sub_one K L hn)
      (Polynomial.Irreducible.dvd_X_pow_sub_one f hf)
  · refine ⟨fun n hn ↦ IsAlgClosure.exists_root_of_separable K L _
      (Polynomial.separable_X_pow_sub_one K n hn), eq_top_iff.mpr fun x _ ↦ ?_⟩
    let E := IntermediateField.adjoin K {x}
    have : Finite E := IntermediateField.finite_adjoin_simple_of_isAlgebraic K _
      (IsAlgClosure.isAlgebraic K L x)
    obtain ⟨α, hα⟩ := FiniteField.exists_primitive_element E
    rw [← hα, IntermediateField.adjoin_simple_le_iff]
    have hn : (Fintype.card E - 1 : K) ≠ 0 := by
      rw [Nat.cast_sub Fintype.one_le_card, Nat.cast_one, CharP.cast_card_eq_zero, zero_sub]
      exact neg_ne_zero.2 one_ne_zero
    exact Algebra.subset_adjoin ⟨Fintype.card E - 1, hn,
      IsPrimitiveRoot.of_orderOf α (FiniteField.orderOf_primitive_element hα).symm⟩

rw [Nat.cast_sub_one (Nat.pow_pos Fintype.card_pos _), Nat.cast_pow,
        CharP.cast_card_eq_zero K, zero_pow (Polynomial.natDegree_pos_of_irreducible hf).ne', zero_sub]
      exact neg_ne_zero.mpr one_ne_zero
    exact Splits.of_dvd _ (IsCyclotomicExtension.splits_X_pow_sub_one K L hn)
      (Polynomial.Irreducible.dvd_X_pow_sub_one hf)
  · haveI := h
    apply IsCyclotomicExtension.of_roots
    intro x
    let n := Fintype.card K ^ (minpoly K x).natDegree - 1
    have hn : (n : K) ≠ 0 := by
      rw [Nat.cast_sub_one (Nat.pow_pos Fintype.card_pos _), Nat.cast_pow,
        CharP.cast_card_eq_zero K, zero_pow (Polynomial.natDegree_pos_of_irreducible (minpoly.irreducible (IsAlgClosure.isAlgebraic K x))).ne', zero_sub]
      exact neg_ne_zero.mpr one_ne_zero
    use n, hn
    rw [← sub_eq_zero, ← map_sub, map_one, map_pow, Polynomial.aeval_X]
    exact minpoly.dvd K x (Polynomial.Irreducible.dvd_X_pow_sub_one (minpoly.irreducible (IsAlgClosure.isAlgebraic K x)))

apply IsAlgClosure.of_irreducible_splits
    intro f hf
    obtain ⟨k, hk, h⟩ := Polynomial.irreducible_dvd_X_pow_sub_X hf
    refine Splits.of_dvd h ?_
    rw [Polynomial.X_pow_sub_X_eq_X_mul_X_pow_sub_one]
    refine Splits.mul (splits_X _) (IsCyclotomicExtension.splits_X_pow_sub_one _ ?_)
    rw [mem_setOf, Ne, sub_eq_add_neg, FiniteField.cast_card_eq_zero K]
    simp [pow_ne_zero hk]
  · let _ := h
    rw [IsCyclotomicExtension.iff_adjoin_roots]
    refine le_antisymm (fun x _ ↦ ?_) le_top
    let E := IntermediateField.adjoin K {x}
    have : FiniteDimensional K E := IntermediateField.adjoin.finiteDimensional (IsAlgClosure.isAlgebraic x).isIntegral
    have : Finite E := Finite.of_finite_of_finiteDimensional K E
    obtain ⟨ζ, hζ⟩ := Field.exists_primitive_element K E
    refine Algebra.adjoin_mono (Set.singleton_subset_iff.mpr ⟨Fintype.card E - 1, ?_, ?_⟩) ?_
    · rw [mem_setOf, Ne, sub_eq_add_neg, add_eq_zero_iff_eq_neg, ← CharP.cast_eq_zero_iff K (ringChar K)]
      simp [ringChar_dvd_card E]
    · exact IsPrimitiveRoot.pow_eq_one (FiniteField.isPrimitiveRoot_primitiveElement K E)
    · rw [← IntermediateField.mem_adjoin_simple_iff_mem_toSubalgebra (IsAlgClosure.isAlgebraic ζ), ← hζ]
      exact IntermediateField.mem_adjoin_simple_self K x

rw [sub_ne_zero, ← CharP.cast_card_eq_zero K]; intro h
      exact one_ne_zero (eq_zero_of_zero_pow (by omega) h).symm
    refine Splits.of_dvd (h.splits n hn) ?_
    exact dvd_trans (Polynomial.Irreducible.dvd_X_pow_card_pow_sub_X f hf)
      (Polynomial.X_pow_sub_X_div_X_dvd_X_pow_sub_one_of_dvd (dvd_refl _) hfX)
  · by_cases hx : x = 0; · rw [hx]; exact zero_mem _
    let E := Algebra.adjoin K {x}
    have : Finite E := Finite.adjoin_of_isAlgebraic (IsAlgClosure.isAlgebraic _ _ _ _)
    let n := Fintype.card E - 1
    have hn : (n : K) ≠ 0 := by
      rw [sub_ne_zero, ← CharP.cast_card_eq_zero K]; intro h
      exact one_ne_zero (eq_zero_of_zero_pow (by omega) h).symm
    refine Algebra.subset_adjoin ⟨n, hn, ?_⟩
    rw [← FiniteField.pow_card_sub_one_eq_one x hx, ← Subtype.coe_inj]
    simp only [SubmonoidClass.coe_pow]; rfl

let n := Fintype.card E - 1
    have hn : (n : K) ≠ 0 := by
      rw [← CharP.cast_eq_zero_iff K (ringChar K), ← CharP.cast_card_eq_zero K]
      exact fun h ↦ Nat.not_dvd_of_pos_of_lt (Nat.sub_pos_of_lt (Fintype.one_lt_card_iff_nontrivial.mpr inferInstance)) (Nat.sub_lt (Fintype.card_pos_iff.mpr inferInstance) (Nat.one_pos)) (Nat.dvd_trans h (Nat.dvd_sub_self (Nat.dvd_refl _)))
    have h_splits : Splits (algebraMap K L) (X ^ n - 1) := IsCyclotomicExtension.splits_X_pow_sub_one L hn
    have h_splits' : Splits (algebraMap K L) (X ^ (n + 1) - X) := by
      rw [splits_X_pow_sub_X_iff, ← Nat.sub_add_cancel (Fintype.card_pos_iff.mpr inferInstance : 0 < Fintype.card E)]
      exact h_splits
    exact (FiniteField.exists_embedding_of_splits K E L (by rwa [Nat.sub_add_cancel (Fintype.card_pos_iff.mpr inferInstance)] at h_splits')).exists
  · apply IsCyclotomicExtension.mk
    · intro n hn
      have h_splits : Splits (algebraMap K L) (X ^ n - 1) := IsAlgClosure.splits_codomain _
      exact (IsSplittingField.of_splits h_splits).exists_primitive_root
    · intro x
      by_cases hx0 : x = 0; · rw [hx0]; exact Subalgebra.zero_mem _
      have : IsAlgebraic K x := IsAlgClosure.isAlgebraic x
      let E := K⟮x⟯
      have : Finite E := Finite.of_fintype E
      let n := Fintype.card E - 1
      have hn : (n : K) ≠ 0 := by
         rw [← CharP.cast_eq_zero_iff K (ringChar K), ← CharP.cast_card_eq_zero K]
         exact fun h ↦ Nat.not_dvd_of_pos_of_lt (Nat.sub_pos_of_lt (Fintype.one_lt_card_iff_nontrivial.mpr inferInstance)) (Nat.sub_lt (Fintype.card_pos_iff.mpr inferInstance) (Nat.one_pos)) (Nat.dvd_trans h (Nat.dvd_sub_self (Nat.dvd_refl _)))
      have hx : x ^ n = 1 := by
        have : x ∈ E := Algebra.subset_adjoin rfl
        have hx_E : (⟨x, this⟩ : E) ^ n = 1 := FiniteField.pow_card_sub_one_eq_one ⟨x, this⟩ (mt (congr_arg (algebraMap E L)) hx0)
        simpa using congr_arg (algebraMap E L) hx_E
      obtain ⟨d, hd, hprim⟩ := IsRootOfUnity.exists_primitiveRoot (IsRootOfUnity.of_pow_eq_one hx hn)
      have hd' : (d : K) ≠ 0 := fun h ↦ hn (dvd_trans hd h)
      exact Algebra.subset_adjoin ⟨d, hd', hprim, rfl⟩

rw [Ne, ← CharP.cast_eq_zero_iff K (ringChar K), ← CharP.cast_eq_zero_iff E (ringChar K)]
      exact (Nat.coprime_self_sub_one _ Fintype.card_pos.ne').mpr (CharP.cast_card_eq_zero E)
    exact Splits.comp (Polynomial.IsSplittingField.lift E (X ^ n - 1) (h.splits_X_pow_sub_one n hn))
      (Polynomial.IsSplittingField.splits _ _)
  · refine IsCyclotomicExtension.iff_splits_and_generated.2 ⟨fun n _ ↦ IsAlgClosed.splits_codomain _, ?_⟩
    rw [eq_top_iff]; intro x
    obtain ⟨n, hn, hx⟩ := FiniteField.exists_root_of_unity_of_isAlgebraic K (IsAlgClosure.isAlgebraic K L x)
    exact IsCyclotomicExtension.subset_adjoin K _ hn ⟨x, hx⟩
